body:
## Context

L1 snapshot 2026-06-24: `shannon larkin drum kit` — pos **4.8** / 13 impr / **0 clicks**. This is the exact pre-fix pattern seen on joey-jordison (pos ~8, 0 clicks → #2544 CTR fix shipped → now 2 clicks/week). Shannon Larkin is our **best-positioned CTR-gap entity**: pos 4.8 is page 1 rank 5, yet zero clicks.

Same diagnosis as the Brann-Dailor-pattern flagged in `.agents/seo/gsc-watch-snapshot.md`: visible but not clicked. The title and/or meta description aren't signaling gear content clearly enough to earn the click.

## Action

In `packages/frontend/data/drummers.js` (or equivalent profile data file), update the **shannon-larkin** entry:

1. **SEO title** — ensure it contains both `drum kit` and `drum set` variants, e.g.:  
   _"Shannon Larkin Drum Kit & Gear Setup | MetalForge"_  
   or _"Shannon Larkin Drum Set — Complete Gear Guide | MetalForge"_
2. **Meta description** — include specific gear callouts (kit brand, cymbal brand, snare model if known) + action phrase, e.g.:  
   _"See exactly what drums, cymbals, and hardware Shannon Larkin (Godsmack) uses — complete gear list with specs."_
3. **H1 / page heading** — if not already: "Shannon Larkin Drum Kit & Setup"

## Verify

1. `/drummer/shannon-larkin` → `<title>` tag contains "drum kit" or "drum set"
2. `<meta name="description">` references specific gear items
3. GSC: watch `shannon larkin drum kit` in next L1 snapshot (2026-07-01); target ≥1 click

## Done

When `/drummer/shannon-larkin` title and meta include gear-specific language and both drum kit/drum set keywords.
title: SEO: Optimize shannon-larkin profile title+meta for 'drum kit' query cluster (pos 4.8 / 13 impr / 0 clicks)
